title: bromelica striata
side_effects: Bromelica striata can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps due to its high levels of bromelain. Improper use can also lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. In addition, excessive consumption of bromelain can cause bleeding disorders, particularly in people taking anticoagulant medications. It's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Bromelica striata or any other plant with potential health benefits.
